Servicios · Services

What We Fix — Fast & Done Right

Reparaciones rápidas y confiables. Fast, reliable repairs for cars and trucks across Sherman and the Texoma region.

⚡
Specialist

Electric Systems

Sistemas Eléctricos

PCM, ECM & BCM coding, car key programming, starter replacement, and full electrical diagnostics. No-start, battery drain, module faults — we find and fix it.

❄️
AC Certified

AC System Specialist

Aire Acondicionado

R-134a & R-1234yf refrigerant recharge and service, full AC diagnostics and repair. Also handles wiring harness issues — including rodent & pest-chewed harnesses.

🛢️
Fast Service

Oil Change

Cambio de Aceite

Conventional and synthetic oil changes with filter replacement. In and out — no long waits, no hassle.

🛑
Safety First

Brakes

Frenos

Pad and rotor replacement, caliper service, brake fluid flush. Don't wait on brakes — we'll get you stopping safe.

🔩
Precision Work

Ball Joints & Suspension

Rótulas y Suspensión

Ball joint replacement, tie rods, and full suspension work. Clunking or loose steering — we diagnose and fix it.

🔬
Same Day

Engine Diagnostics

Diagnóstico de Motor & Más

Check engine light? We scan the codes, tell you exactly what's wrong, and quote you honestly before any work begins. Cooling, leaks & mucho más.

Sobre Nosotros · About

Luis Urbina & Alfa Motors

Alfa Motors fue fundado con una misión simple: reparaciones rápidas, honestas y a buen precio. Alfa Motors was built on a simple mission — fast, honest repairs at a fair price, right here in Sherman, TX.

Owner Luis Urbina is the kind of mechanic who tells you exactly what's wrong and what it'll cost before any work starts — no upsell, no runaround. Customers come back for everything from spark plugs to full diagnostics, and send their family too. That's the Alfa Motors way. Honest. Thorough. Fast.

Located at 124 Industrial Dr, Ste #5212 in Sherman, we serve Sherman, Denison, Pottsboro, and the entire Texoma region. Walk-ins welcome.

"My truck is 10 years old and they got it running like new again. The quote was less than every other place I called, and the work was finished faster than I expected." — David Rodriguez · Google Local Guide

How It Works

Fast Jobs, Simple Process

1

Call Luis Direct

Call (469) 951-0500 or email alfamotors1978@gmail.com. Luis answers and gives it to you straight.

2

Drop It Off

Bring your vehicle to 124 Industrial Dr, Ste #5212, Sherman TX. Walk-ins welcome Mon–Sat.

3

Honest Diagnosis

We find what's wrong, tell you upfront, and quote you honestly before any work starts. No surprises.

4

Fast Repair

We work fast without cutting corners. Most repairs done same-day. Pick up and hit the road.
